title: angelica pinnatiloba
intro: Angelica pinnatiloba, also known as Dong Quai, is a perennial plant native to China, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Angelica pinnatiloba include its ability to reduce menstrual cramps, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Angelica pinnatiloba is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used in herbal combinations to support women's health and overall well-being.
